query: Terrion Arnold Detroit Lions Commissioner's Exempt List released waived NFL transaction status July 2026
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's the key finding on the research question:

**As of July 13, 2026, Terrion Arnold is an unsigned free agent — NOT on the Commissioner's Exempt List.**

The sequence:
- **June 29, 2026**: Lions **waived** him (via team announcement) after his arrest on 8 felony charges (kidnapping/armed robbery from a February Tampa incident).
- **July 1**: Transaction posted to NFL report with a **July 6, 4:00 p.m. ET waiver claim deadline**.
- **July 6**: **Cleared waivers unclaimed** → became a **free agent**.

On the Commissioner's Exempt List specifically: he has **not** been placed on it. That list only applies to players on an NFL roster, so it's inapplicable to him as an unsigned free agent. Reporting notes Goodell *could* place him on the Exempt List **if he signs** with a team — a key deterrent to signing. Four teams (Colts, Jets, Seahawks, Texans) inquired, and he worked out for the Texans, but no signing had occurred as of mid-July 2026, and analysts agree his court schedule means he won't play in 2026 regardless.

sources.title: Lions Waive CB Terrion Arnold
sources.snippet: The Lions have waived cornerback Terrion Arnold, per a team announcement. The former first-round pick was recently charged with eight felonies in Florida.

sources.title: Lions officially waive Terrion Arnold
sources.snippet: The official move appears on Wednesday's report of NFL transactions. The claiming deadline is Monday, July 6, at 4:00 p.m. ET. He'd possibly be placed on paid leave (Commissioner's Exempt List).

sources.title: Arnold clears waivers, becomes free agent amid court case
sources.snippet: Arnold cleared waivers on Monday, meaning no NFL team claimed his contract following his release by the Lions; expected to visit teams that expressed interest.

sources.title: Terrion Arnold, former Lions CB, a free agent after clearing waivers
sources.snippet: Arnold cleared waivers Monday (July 6), making him a free agent eligible to sign elsewhere. Released June 29 after arrest; posted $1 million bond.

sources.title: Agent testifies that Colts, Jets, Seahawks, and Texans have inquired about Terrion Arnold
sources.snippet: July 10 court hearing on GPS monitor; judge denied prosecution motion. Four teams inquired; agent says very good likelihood of signing within 45 days. NFL could place him on Commissioner Exempt List.

sources.title: Former Lions CB Terrion Arnold clears waivers, 3 teams interested
sources.snippet: On Monday, former Detroit Lions cornerback Terrion Arnold cleared waivers, as expected. Faces eight felony charges from February incident.

sources.title: Former Lions CB Terrion Arnold worked out for Texans, received interest from three other teams
sources.snippet: Arnold worked out for the Texans; facing possibility of life in prison if convicted but still receiving NFL interest.

sources.title: Former Lions cornerback Terrion Arnold could sign with a new team soon, but don't expect him to play
sources.snippet: Arnold could land a new NFL contract within a month, but the courtroom schedule guarantees he will not play football in 2026.

sources.title: Terrion Arnold Contract, Salary & Cap Hit 2026
sources.snippet: 4 yr / $14,343,710 rookie contract, fully guaranteed; signing bonus $7,251,788; drafted Round 1 (#24) 2024. Listed INACTIVE.
